name: ifl-ios-standards
description: Boardy+VIP iOS engineering standards for Codex. Ships specialist agents, a QUICK_REF-driven router skill plus clustered task skills (new-module, new-board, io-interface, communication, service-layer, plugin-composition, testing, review, refactor, troubleshoot, adopt), the full architecture rulebook + specs + process standards as bundled reference, and Bazel module/board scaffolders.

interface.shortDescription: Boardy+VIP iOS architecture standards, agents, and scaffolders
interface.longDescription: Brings the Boardy+VIP iOS engineering standard into Codex: a task-routing skill set (new module/board, IO interface, communication, service layer, plugin composition, testing, review, refactor, troubleshoot, adopt), specialist agents for delegated delivery, the full rulebook + specs + process standards (docs-organization, lean-verification) as bundled reference, and Bazel module/board scaffolders. Reference paths shown as ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/standards/… resolve relative to this plugin's root under Codex.
defaultPrompt: Add a new Boardy VIP module to this iOS project
Review this Swift code against the Boardy+VIP standards
Scaffold a viewless board in module X
